articles.title: Officials warned English-first logo change could harm Crown–Māori ties
articles.excerpt: The Government's branding was updated in May to have English ahead of te reo.
articles.content:
The Public Service Commission advised that the changes could be viewed negatively by some, given a Waitangi Tribunal inquiry on the use of te reo in the public sector.
Given the tribunals findings, …

articles.title: Five plug-in hybrids with the longest ranges and why these drivers love their PHEVs
articles.excerpt: There are now many plug-in hybrids that can cover over 70 miles of EV range - from estates to SUVs to compact cars.
articles.content:
Plug-in hybrids are experiencing a surge in popularity - and the long electric ranges they offer are a big part of the pull.
In the year-to-date, PHEV sales are up 41.8 per cent, with a market share…

articles.title: Israel’s Deputy Foreign Minister Resigns Over Haredi Draft Law
